Tomahawk Park, 3951 W 119th St, Leawood, KS 66209, USA
About 22 small crabapples here. Might be good for cider. Access: Public.
Black walnuts along the path here. Easy to tell as they're staining the sidewalk. Access: Public.
5020 Indian Creek Pkwy, Overland Park, KS 66211, USA
Several small paw paw trees are growing along the trail and the creek bank Falling Fruit season: June-July.
An entire grove of pawpaws. Multiple wild varieties! Access: Public.
Nice young persimmon tree. I've collected fruit there several Autumns now. Fruit retains some astringency even after it's soft. Might be best fermented to make alcohol. Access: Public.
10977 Granada Ln, Overland Park, KS 66211, USA

Two cherry plum trees, with lots of small cherries. The trees are used as decoration in a multi-office building's parking lot, so I doubt anyone would know/care if some cherries were collected. Access: Private.
